name: DevTools
description: Developer toolkit with JSON formatter, Base64, hashing, UUID generator, timestamps, and URL encoding.

tools.name: json_format
tools.description: Format, minify, or validate a JSON string

tools.name: base64
tools.description: Encode or decode a Base64 string

tools.name: hash
tools.description: Generate a SHA-256 hash of text

tools.name: uuid
tools.description: Generate one or more v4 UUIDs

tools.name: timestamp
tools.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and ISO dates
